headline: Gilead’s Tubulis Deal Recasts Oncology Ambitions And HIV Reliance Risks
summary: Gilead Sciences is acquiring Tubulis GmbH in a deal worth up to $5b, its third major transaction in six weeks. The Tubulis deal brings next generation antibody drug conjugate technology and a pipeline of cancer therapies into Gilead’s oncology portfolio. Gilead has also acquired Arcellx and Ouro Medicines and exercised licensing options with Kymera Therapeutics and Cartography Biosciences to expand its cancer and autoimmune pipeline. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:GILD, these moves come as...

headline: Gilead price target raised to $175 from $171 at Morgan Stanley
summary: Morgan Stanley raised the firm’s price target on Gilead (GILD) to $175 from $171 and keeps an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm adjusted models among its biopharma coverage for IQVIA trends as well as intra-quarter updates ahead of Q1 earnings reporting from the group.Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanksUnlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Pic
